description: Call GET /api/v1/web/html for Web Crawling Html through Just Serp API with url.

operations.description: Get webpage crawl data, including returns full raw HTML content, fast and cost-efficient, and optimized for static page crawling, for scraping, metadata extraction, and page structure analysis.

parameters.description: The full URL of the webpage to crawl (e.g., 'https://www.example.com').
parameters.name: url

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
